useCases.title: AI permit-status assistant for residents
useCases.businessProblem: Residents and 311 agents cannot see where a building permit is stuck, generating thousands of status calls per month.
useCases.currentProcess: Manual lookups across two systems; 6–8 minutes per call with frequent escalations.
useCases.challengeSummary: Give residents and agents self-service permit status without adding staff.
useCases.proposedSolution: RAG assistant grounded on the permit system plus a status API, surfaced in a resident web chat and an agent-assist panel.
useCases.businessValue: Deflects routine status calls, gives residents faster answers, and frees reviewers for complex cases.
useCases.risks: Status API access approval; PII handling in chat transcripts.
useCases.dataDependencies: Permit DB read access; address normalization service.
useCases.compliance: PII review needed for transcripts; no CJIS data involved.
useCases.nextStep: Scope a 2-week pilot with DOB IT.
useCases.lessons: A thin status API plus RAG beat a full system rebuild; agents valued the assist panel more than the public chat.

useCases.title: Benefits eligibility pre-screener
useCases.businessProblem: Applicants spend hours on applications they are ineligible for, and caseworkers spend time rejecting incomplete submissions.
useCases.currentProcess: Paper/PDF intake; eligibility determined late by a caseworker after submission.
useCases.challengeSummary: Help applicants self-assess eligibility before applying.
useCases.proposedSolution: Conversational pre-screener that asks plain-language questions and explains likely eligibility with required documents, human-in-the-loop for edge cases.
useCases.businessValue: Reduces ineligible applications and caseworker rework; improves applicant experience and trust.
useCases.risks: Must avoid giving authoritative determinations; clear disclaimers required.
useCases.compliance: Sensitive program data; equity and accessibility review required.
useCases.nextStep: Align with HRA modernization roadmap via account team.
useCases.lessons: Framing as 'pre-screen, not decision' was essential for agency comfort.

useCases.title: 311 multilingual citizen assistant
useCases.businessProblem: Non-English speakers struggle to navigate 311 services and wait on long calls for routine requests.
useCases.currentProcess: Phone agents with live interpreters; long hold times for common requests.
useCases.challengeSummary: Provide reliable multilingual self-service for common 311 requests.
useCases.proposedSolution: Multilingual assistant that handles common service requests and routes complex cases to agents with a translated summary.
useCases.businessValue: Improves equitable access and deflects routine multilingual calls.
useCases.impactMetric: Top 5 languages covered for common requests
useCases.risks: Translation quality for civic terminology; agent trust.
useCases.lessons: Civic-term glossary noticeably improved translation quality.

useCases.title: Pothole image triage from 311 photos
useCases.businessProblem: Pothole reports arrive with photos but are triaged manually, delaying severity-based dispatch.
useCases.currentProcess: Staff visually review photos and assign priority by hand.
useCases.challengeSummary: Auto-classify pothole severity from citizen photos to speed dispatch.
useCases.proposedSolution: Vision model that scores severity and clusters nearby reports to batch repairs.
useCases.businessValue: Faster severity-based dispatch and batched repairs.
useCases.impactMetric: Potential faster response on high-severity reports
useCases.risks: Photo quality variance; liability of automated severity calls.
useCases.nextStep: Gather a labeled image set to validate accuracy.
useCases.lessons: Clustering nearby reports may deliver more value than the severity score alone.

useCases.title: Inspection report auto-draft
useCases.businessProblem: Inspectors spend significant time writing up reports from field notes after each visit.
useCases.currentProcess: Handwritten/voice notes transcribed later into a formatted report.
useCases.challengeSummary: Turn structured field notes into a compliant draft report.
useCases.proposedSolution: Copilot-assisted drafting that converts checklist + voice notes into a formatted report for inspector review.
useCases.businessValue: Recovers inspector time and improves report consistency.
useCases.risks: Accuracy of auto-drafted findings; mandatory human sign-off.
useCases.compliance: Reports are legal records — human approval mandatory.
useCases.nextStep: Pilot with a small inspector cohort for accuracy and trust.
useCases.lessons: Inspectors wanted to edit, not just accept — review UX matters more than raw generation.

useCases.title: FOIL / records request triage
useCases.businessProblem: Public records requests are routed and de-duplicated manually, creating backlogs.
useCases.currentProcess: Staff read each request, categorize, and route to the owning agency.
useCases.challengeSummary: Auto-classify and route records requests with duplicate detection.
useCases.proposedSolution: Classifier that tags request type, suggests the owning office, and flags likely duplicates.
useCases.businessValue: Could reduce routing time and backlog if data access is granted.
useCases.risks: Sensitive request content; legal review of any automation.
useCases.dataDependencies: Historical requests with outcomes (not yet available).
useCases.compliance: Records law constraints; legal sign-off required.
useCases.nextStep: Park until historical data access and legal guidance are available.
useCases.lessons: Compelling idea but blocked on data and legal — good incubation candidate later.

useCases.title: Transit incident summarizer for the ops center
useCases.businessProblem: During disruptions the ops center is flooded with feeds and must brief leadership quickly.
useCases.currentProcess: Operators manually compile updates from multiple feeds into a status brief.
useCases.challengeSummary: Auto-summarize live incident feeds into a rolling brief.
useCases.proposedSolution: Streaming summarizer that fuses incident feeds into a concise, continuously updated brief with severity flags.
useCases.businessValue: Faster, clearer leadership briefings during disruptions.
useCases.risks: Real-time feed access; accuracy under high load.
useCases.nextStep: Identify a follow-up owner and validate incident data feed access.
useCases.lessons: Strong demo energy but no owner stepped up — at risk of stalling without intervention.

useCases.title: Health inspection scheduling optimizer
useCases.businessProblem: Inspection routes are planned manually, leading to inefficient travel and missed risk-based prioritization.
useCases.currentProcess: Schedulers build routes by hand using spreadsheets and local knowledge.
useCases.challengeSummary: Optimize inspection scheduling by risk and geography.
useCases.proposedSolution: Optimization service that prioritizes by risk score and clusters visits geographically, with a planner UI.
useCases.businessValue: More risk-aligned inspections and reduced travel time.
useCases.impactMetric: Est. 15% more high-risk inspections per week
useCases.risks: Risk-scoring fairness; data quality of facility records.
useCases.nextStep: Confirm scheduling data feed and run a 3-week pilot with DOH ops.
useCases.lessons: Explainability of the risk score was the key to inspector buy-in.

useCases.title: Unemployment claims document extraction
useCases.businessProblem: Claims processors manually key data from uploaded documents, creating backlogs and errors.
useCases.currentProcess: Staff read each uploaded document and type fields into the claims system.
useCases.challengeSummary: Auto-extract structured fields from claim documents to speed processing.
useCases.proposedSolution: Document-intelligence pipeline that extracts and validates fields, routing low-confidence items to a reviewer.
useCases.businessValue: Cuts manual keying, reduces errors, and shortens claim cycle time.
useCases.impactMetric: Est. 40% less manual data entry on claims
useCases.risks: Extraction accuracy on poor scans; sensitive PII.
useCases.compliance: PII-heavy; strict access controls and audit required.
useCases.nextStep: Productionize the pipeline; reuse the DOCINTEL accelerator.
useCases.lessons: Reusing the document-extraction accelerator saved an estimated half-day of build time.

useCases.title: Multilingual benefits notices generator
useCases.businessProblem: Translating benefit notices into required languages is slow and inconsistent.
useCases.currentProcess: Notices drafted in English, then sent out for manual translation.
useCases.challengeSummary: Generate consistent multilingual notices with human review.
useCases.proposedSolution: Template-driven generator that produces multilingual notices from structured case data with reviewer approval.
useCases.businessValue: Faster, more consistent multilingual citizen communications.
useCases.risks: Legal accuracy of translated notices; approval workflow.
useCases.compliance: Legally binding notices require certified review.
useCases.nextStep: Confirm legal review workflow before any pilot.
useCases.lessons: Legal review is the gating step, not the generation quality.

useCases.title: DMV appointment demand forecaster
useCases.businessProblem: Appointment capacity is set with little forecasting, causing long waits at peak times.
useCases.currentProcess: Capacity planned from static historical averages.
useCases.challengeSummary: Forecast demand to set smarter appointment capacity.
useCases.proposedSolution: Forecasting model on historical appointment and seasonality data feeding a capacity-planning dashboard.
useCases.impactMetric: Potential reduction in peak wait times
useCases.risks: Data quality; change management for staffing.
useCases.nextStep: Validate forecast accuracy against a holdout period.
useCases.lessons: Operational adoption depends on branch staffing flexibility, not just model accuracy.

useCases.title: Fleet maintenance failure predictor
useCases.businessProblem: Vehicle fleet failures are reactive, causing unplanned downtime.
useCases.currentProcess: Maintenance on fixed schedules; failures handled reactively.
useCases.challengeSummary: Predict failures from telematics to enable proactive maintenance.
useCases.proposedSolution: Predictive model on telematics and maintenance history flagging at-risk vehicles.
useCases.businessValue: Would reduce downtime, but required telematics data is not collected.
useCases.risks: Required sensor/telematics data does not exist today.
useCases.nextStep: Park — revisit only if telematics data collection is funded.
useCases.lessons: No data foundation means no model — surfaced a data-collection gap worth a separate conversation.
